reviews.comment:
Cada año...empeora la atención y servicio. No es, lo que siempre fue...una estación linda para parar en cualquier momento.

(Translated by Google)
Every year...the service and attention get worse. It's not what it used to be...a nice station to stop at anytime.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNGUtVHp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Me encanta el lugar, comida fresca y a buen precio. Instalaciones en muy buen Estado, baño limpio (Hombres) y amplio lugar para estacionar.

(Translated by Google)
I love this place; the food is fresh and reasonably priced. The facilities are in excellent condition, the men's restroom is clean, and there's plenty of parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxaWVHY0dREAE

reviews.comment:
El mejor parador de San Pedro. Baños de lujo. Agua para el mate. Ricas medialunas, hacen ensaimadas. Cuenta con una plaza de juegos para entretener a los más chicos.

(Translated by Google)
The best inn in San Pedro. Luxurious bathrooms. Hot water for mate. Delicious croissants, they make ensaimadas. It has a playground to entertain the little ones.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncDlHYXd3RRAB
